summary: A CRITICAL campaign spanning 104 compromised accounts. From pivot host C17693, the attacker authenticated to 469 hosts, reaching the critical asset C1015, C1065, C2106, C231, C3173, C457, C467, C528, C529, C585, C586, C612, C625, C706, C743, C801. 1243 anomaly alerts were correlated from 2732 events into this single campaign.

attributed_actor.justification: Ember Bear matches 3/3 observed techniques (profile coverage 100%; semantic similarity 0.76).

response_actions.action: Isolate the pivot host, block SMB/NTLM between segments
Isolate choke-point host C17693 (cuts blast radius of 469 hosts)
Open incident ticket INC-PS7-LANL-CAMPAIGN + notify SOC lead

mitigations: Disable or Remove Feature or Program

mttd.citation: Mandiant M-Trends 2024 - global median dwell ~10 days
mttd.note: time to first correlated alert in this log (measured); industry dwell is a cited comparison, not our claim
